evals.prompt: Write the executive summary for Bright Smile Dental monthly report. They paid 4000 this month. Baseline was 7200/month. We handled 318 calls, booked 127 appointments, response time dropped from 4 hours to 8 seconds. 15.8% escalation rate.
evals.expected_output: Produce 325-475 word summary with Situation, Key Finding, Financial Impact, 3 quantified Performance Highlights, and Priority Actions.
expectations: The response includes Financial Impact with 4000 cost, 7200 baseline, and calculated savings
The response references all 3 metrics: 318 calls, 127 appointments, 8-second response time
The response includes the 15.8% escalation rate
The response contains no vague adjectives (significantly, greatly, excellent)

evals.prompt: Write a summary of what we accomplished this month for my own review.
evals.expected_output: Use Bottom Line Up Front format with 1-sentence conclusion first, or ask for data if none provided.
expectations: The response uses BLUF structure with conclusion first
The response asks for actual data/numbers if none were provided
The response structure includes Findings, Recommendation, and Risk
The response does not write vague summaries without quantified data

evals.prompt: Here is my draft: This month we significantly improved our performance across multiple metrics and achieved great results overall with a good customer satisfaction rating. Make it better.
evals.expected_output: Reject the draft as unpublishable (no numbers, vague adjectives), ask for actual data, explain what evidence is needed.
expectations: The response rejects the draft rather than editing around the vagueness
The response identifies significantly improved and great results as unacceptable vague language
The response asks for specific numbers before rewriting
The response does not produce a rewrite without actual data
